texto: Pride and resentment are not indigenous to the human heart
autor: and perhaps it is due to the gardener's innate love of the exotic that we take such pains to make them thrive.
explicacao: Citação de and perhaps it is due to the gardener's innate love of the exotic that we take such pains to make them thrive. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Pride and resentment are not indigenous to the human heart” articula amor, hope-mirrlees, lud-in-the-mist em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como lud-in-the-mist.
